message.content:
@startuml
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ParticipantPadding 30
  BoxPadding 10
}

participant "用户信息正确请求URL" as User
participant "UrlFilterSecurityInterceptor" as Interceptor
participant "UrlMetadataSourceService" as Metadata
participant "UrlConfigAttribute" as ConfigAttr
participant "UrlAccessDecisionManager" as DecisionMgr

User -> Interceptor : Authentication Request
Interceptor -> Metadata : getAttributes(Object object)
Metadata -> ConfigAttr : UrlConfigAttribute(HttpServletRequest httpServletRequest)
Metadata -> DecisionMgr : decide(Authentication authentication, Object object, Collection<ConfigAttribute> configAttributes)
@enduml
